scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace @happitime/shared-env && npm run build --workspace @happitime/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @happitime/shared-api
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run build:shared && npm run start --workspace mobile
scripts.dev:android: npm run build:shared && npm run start --workspace android
scripts.android: npm run build:shared && npm run android --workspace android
scripts.build:android: npm run build:shared && npm run build:android --workspace android
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace web && npm run lint --workspace mobile && npm run lint --workspace android
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace web && npm run typecheck --workspace mobile && npm run typecheck --workspace android
scripts.mvp:check: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace web && node --test test/smoke-*.test.mjs && node scripts/validate-env.mjs apps/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace web
